message:
refactor(tests): migrate pool_leak test from tokio to native asupersync runtime

- Remove tokio dependency: replace #[tokio::main] with asupersync Runtime
- Use asupersync::time::{sleep, timeout, wall_now} instead of tokio::time
- Pass wall_now() to sleep() calls per asupersync API convention
- Use timeout() wrapper instead of tokio::time::timeout
- Remove stale NOTE comment about tokio migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
